query: SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, ' ', 1) as prefix, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM establishments WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' GROUP BY prefix HAVING cnt > 5 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 40;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, ' ', 1) as prefix, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM establishments WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' GROUP BY prefix HAVING cnt > 5 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 40;
